programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam's excited about his approaching graduation day but Beverly's not coping well with the idea of an empty nest.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Following Murray's death, Adam, Barry and Erica all come home to be closer to Mum.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The One at a Rugby Match: Rugby-loving Wes plans the biggest wedding ever, in front of 26,000 people at a rugby match. But bride-to-be Charlotte wants something intimate.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Christmas is in full swing at the Dunphy house, until the kids get into trouble and Phil and Claire threaten to cancel Christmas unless one of them fesses up.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria isn't happy with Jay's reaction to the arrival of Javier, Manny's infamously unreliable dad. Phil is suffering from kidney stones.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister, Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorbike and bicycle variety.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon's in New York, where the stress of running a Greek restaurant has driven Manny and Christine to the brink of divorce, with their daughter stuck in the middle.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is worried about how Beverly will handle him going off to college, so he tries to get a dream job right in their hometown.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is disappointed by his life at home, so Beverly asks some unlikely friends to take him for a night out in Jenkintown. (10.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay makes it clear that he wants to keep his birthday as low-key as possible.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire have a five-year plan - to vacation and enjoy life once Luke leaves for college. To keep the plan on track, Phil decides to have a vasectomy.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The couples have met their alternate matches. But now it's time for the real carnage: getting them to watch videos of how their spouses behaved.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Aspiring rapper Matt meets music producer Breda. Abbie warms up a tongue-tied Matt. And can dynamic grandma Karen give retired teacher Jim's dating game a much-needed boost.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits an Italian restaurant with an identity crisis in Colorado, for the first half of a two-part Nightmare. The owner is at breaking point.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa and Moe bond over baseball, and hatch a plan to make the Springfield Isotopes great again.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer's obsessed with an extreme eating show. Somehow, that ends up with him getting chased by the mob when a stew recipe is stolen from Fat Tony.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria's mum and sister visit from Colombia, and they come bearing traditions, baby names and a whole lot of family baggage.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron is putting on the school production of Phantom of the Opera, but when their star falls ill, Manny pulls out all the stops to land the lead.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The couples have met their alternate matches. But now it's time for the real carnage: getting them to watch videos of how their spouses behaved.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Relentless optimist Charlie has a heart-to-heart with emotional osteopath Benji. And will single mum Rachel be happy to roll with divorced toilet paper salesman Stephen.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge agrees to pretend to be Apu's wife when his mother visits to set up his arranged marriage, and Homer moves into the Retirement Castle.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: During a school archaeological dig, Lisa finds the skeleton of an angel on the site where a new shopping mall is to be built.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa's old friend Gus wants his help at the helm of his fast-food empire, leading to a Succession-style plot of corporate espionage. With John Lithgow.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia - Brand new series
programme.desc: The final dinner party is upon us, and one couple are on the brink after the tumult of meeting their alternate matches.

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: The celebs mingle with a roomful of sexy singles at their first mixer, while the agents watch on and assess their romantic endeavours..

programme.title: MAFS Australia: After the Dinner Party - Brand new series
programme.desc: After six no-shows, Gia finally fronts up to face the music in a tense interview. And John Aiken leads a tribute to the late Mel Schilling.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Pansexual Sarah can't wait to road test her new body on her first date as a woman. Plumber Jamie's love life has gone down the u-bend, so he's all cisterns go to find a partner.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Welcome to Wrexham, The Good Ship Murder, Married at First Sight UK, Coronation Street and Nadiya's Simple Spices are just some of the great TV shows up for review.

programme.title: E4 Preview
programme.desc: A look ahead at the entertainment coming up on E4.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The final dinner party is upon us, and one couple are on the brink after the tumult of meeting their alternate matches.

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: The celebs mingle with a roomful of sexy singles at their first mixer, while the agents watch on and assess their romantic endeavours..

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is worried about how Beverly will handle him going off to college, so he tries to get a dream job right in their hometown.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is disappointed by his life at home, so Beverly asks some unlikely friends to take him for a night out in Jenkintown. (10.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Self-conscious groom Richard plans a first-class trip for his bride. Can he meet straight-talking Latrice's big hopes for a deluxe event.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell seeks revenge when Jay introduces Cameron as just his 'friend'. Gloria gives Manny's date a makeover.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire feels slightly inadequate when her old friend, Valerie (guest star Minnie Driver), visits and is nothing like Claire remembered.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip featuring animals and food, from the always hilarious Tube that is Rude.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits an Italian restaurant with an identity crisis in Colorado, for the first half of a two-part Nightmare. The owner is at breaking point.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica's graduation is eclipsed by excitement about the new baby. Adam and Barry compete to be 'man of the house' in Murray's absence.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica asks Geoff to take her on a 'babymoon' to get her far away from Beverly. But then Erica's water breaks and she goes into labour..

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: On her first day at kindergarten, Lily gets into a tussle with a little boy, and Mitch and Cam have to meet his confrontational parents.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Luke wants to quit magic, but Phil can't accept it. One of Gloria's new pregnancy symptoms is snoring and she's keeping the whole house awake.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart grows jealous of Lisa's relationship with Maggie and heads to an orphanage to find a baby brother. Guest starring Kim Cattrall.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa tells a journalist about his wartime service on a battleship. The story brings Grampa lots of attention, but his relationship with Homer suffers.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Once Upon a Time in Springfield: Krusty gets a beautiful new co-star (guest voice Anne Hathaway). Mr Burns withdraws the staff's free doughnuts at the nuclear power plant.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Relentless optimist Charlie has a heart-to-heart with emotional osteopath Benji. And will single mum Rachel be happy to roll with divorced toilet paper salesman Stephen.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon returns to Colorado to conclude his attempt to help an Italian restaurant. Can he work his magic on a menu that relies on a microwave.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa and Homer accidentally invent a new sport while arguing in a drained pool. But trouble arrives when Big Avocado sponsors it.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Bart and Lisa lose interest in their only shared love, Marge worries they'll drift apart as they grow up. Cue a glimpse into the future.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire flies solo to her college reunion, where she bumps into a professor who she once dated, and when Phil shows up things get awkward.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire and Cam are busy with the house renovation, but when they can't agree on a big landscaping decision, a 'neutral' third party is brought in.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart grows jealous of Lisa's relationship with Maggie and heads to an orphanage to find a baby brother. Guest starring Kim Cattrall.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa tells a journalist about his wartime service on a battleship. The story brings Grampa lots of attention, but his relationship with Homer suffers.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Once Upon a Time in Springfield: Krusty gets a beautiful new co-star (guest voice Anne Hathaway). Mr Burns withdraws the staff's free doughnuts at the nuclear power plant.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A retired champion car racer meets a champion ballroom dancer who's looking for a man 'with balls'. And sparks fly when Babestation model Rebecca meets leather-clad Mak.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge takes a job with Lionel Hutz's estate agency, but begins to question her morals when she has to try to sell the infamous Murder House to Ned Flanders.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Bart destroys the family's Christmas tree and presents, his lies about a burglar stealing them spiral out of control.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart ends up idolising Homer after accompanying him to work, and resolves to grow up just like him. But Lisa and Hugh Jackman have some alarming news for him..

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer's boorishness inspires Marge to give the performance of a lifetime in a musical version of A Streetcar Named Desire.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Will a gaming nerd finally find her 'geeky James Bond'? Can an actor overcome their First Dates stage nerves? And will an ex-wild thing's tattoos wreck his chances of new love.

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: The celebs arrive in Tenerife, ready for their dates with their mixer picks. Gabby dates gym-owner Karl, while David heads out for dinner with fireman Tomasz.

programme.title: The Predator
programme.desc: Unrestrained reboot of the franchise defined by a ruthless extraterrestrial killer whose name says it all... and it's had a DNA upgrade. All the better to kill you with, my dear.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Pansexual sex therapist Mariia's after a not-so-average Mr or Mrs who's not too tired for sex. Old romantic at heart Alannah seeks a forever fella who can speak her love language.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Cupid has a big surprise for mum-of-two Emma. Is lofty rocker Squid the man for six-foot-tall Kat? And will Fran be dapper Will's English rose.

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: The celebs arrive in Tenerife, ready for their dates with their mixer picks. Gabby dates gym-owner Karl, while David heads out for dinner with fireman Tomasz.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: A Valentine's Day romp between Phil and Claire's alter egos, Clive Bixby and Juliana, takes an unexpected turn that lands Claire in hospital.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Sal makes one of her notorious surprise drop-ins at Mitch and Cam's, but this time with big news - she's getting married. Cam and Mitch are the best men.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica's graduation is eclipsed by excitement about the new baby. Adam and Barry compete to be 'man of the house' in Murray's absence.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica asks Geoff to take her on a 'babymoon' to get her far away from Beverly. But then Erica's water breaks and she goes into labour..

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom Ash wants to pull off the most romantic wedding ever, but his bride-to-be Vicki shuns anything corny.
